nodes.context: Largest triad in Taiwan, involved in drug trafficking, contract killing, and extortion.
Taiwanese gang that allied with Bamboo Union for heroin trade and overseas missions.
One of Taiwan's three main criminal triads, attended Chen Chi-li's funeral.
One of Taiwan's three main criminal triads, attended Chen Chi-li's funeral.
Japanese organized crime group; members attended Chen Chi-li's funeral and Bamboo Union partners with them.
Multi-ethnic triad syndicate; Bamboo Union partners with them for drug trafficking and money laundering.

edges.context: Allied in early 1980s for overseas missions and heroin trade; ended after Henry Liu murder.
Representatives of Four Seas Triad attended Chen Chi-li's funeral.
Representatives of Celestial Way attended Chen Chi-li's funeral.
Bamboo Union partners with Japanese yakuza for drug trafficking and money laundering.
Bamboo Union partners with Sam Gor syndicate for drug trafficking and money laundering.
